name: Liqueur-Flavored Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Liqueur (e.g., rum, amaretto, bourbon, Kahlúa, or apricot brandy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the chocolate chips and Crisco, in a large plastic bag.
2. Mix together well by kneading outside of the plastic bag.
3. When completely blended, form small balls and place on waxed paper in one layer.
4. Chill quickly in the freezer for about 20 minutes (uncovered).
5. Meanwhile, melt chocolate chips with 1/2 block of paraffin or 2 tablespoons Crisco shortening in a double boiler over medium-low heat.
6. When the candy balls are chilled, dip them one at a time in the melted chocolate.
7. Store in a cool place.
Can use rum, amaretto, bourbon, Kahlúa, or brandies such as apricot brandy.
